extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco destroyed the 19-mile flat time trial by 48 seconds over ROGLIC Primoz, extending GC lead through pure power on pan-flat terrain.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL Remco gained 48 seconds on ROGLIC on completely flat terrain, revealing pure power advantage independent of climbing ability.
BikeExchange team riders HEPBURN and DURBRIDGE placed 2nd/3rd, suggesting their equipment/positioning setup was optimal for this profile.
YATES Simon lost 50 seconds despite previous TT capability, indicating either illness recovery limitations or equipment mismatch on flat speed parcours.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: 54kph average speed on flat TT at age 22 confirms he possesses diesel engine power rare in climber-weight riders
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: 48-second loss to EVENEPOEL on flat TT larger than expected, suggests his power-to-drag ratio disadvantage on non-technical courses
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: 50-second deficit indicates post-illness form still compromised despite top-5 GC position after nine stages
rider_signals.HEPBURN Michael: positive: BikeExchange equipment/aero setup allowed domestique to briefly hold hot seat at 54kph, revealing team TT optimization
rider_signals.RODRÍGUEZ Carlos: neutral: Young GC rider maintained fourth overall through rest day, confirming early-race climbing form was genuine not anomaly
